chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3569 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.15395 / 2017. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.15396 / 2017. 4. For katcha peshi. 18-01-2018 None present for petitioner. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari Assistant A.G. Sindh along with respondent No.4. Mr. Habibur Rehman Legal Assistant for NADRA. This petition is called for hearing. Neither the petitioner nor his counsel is present. No intimation received. It is 12.25 p.m. Learned A.A.G. files comments of respondents No.3 and 4 along with certain documents, taken on record. Since none is present on behalf of petitioner, it appears that perhaps the petitioner has lost interest in the matter, which is dismissed in non- prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
